gherkin:
Given  a user is on the mlb.com/live-stream-games (Media Center)
And the calendar from the Games page is displayed
When the user selects the ""<"" or "">"" buttons in the calendar
And selects a day in the month that has games
Or the user opens the calendar picker and selects the “Today” button
Then the appropriate month and year is displayed as the user presses the ""<"" or "">"" buttons
And the appropriate day with the appropriate games are displayed on the games page after the user selects a day
